title: 電脳奥義炸裂！ヤエノ出稽古修行

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, as I head to the arcade for some fun...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Yaeno! What the heck's going on with you?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I heard you've been practically living in the
arcade lately!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Any free time you've got is always spent training,
but not now... Something must be up!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Oh no. Have you gone to... the dark side?!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Absolutely not, Bamboo. On the contrary...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I am not merely playing here. I am training.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Training?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Seeing is believing, I suppose. Watch this game—no—this match with your very own eyes.

text_block_list.name: Arcade Regular
text_block_list.text: Bam, bam, bam, bam! Hah! Take that!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: What?! Hi-yah!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, I see! You don't just win by landing heavy
blows one after another. You have to counter
their moves as well?!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. To seize victory in fighting games, one
must remain "one step ahead" by unleashing an
unrelenting barrage of combos... and then go
"one step beyond" with a counterattack!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Amazing! So it's like choosing between being a
front runner or a late surger!

text_block_list.name: Arcade Regular
text_block_list.text:
Hey! Keep your eyes on the game! Or else...
Ironbreaker Kick!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Ah! This is bad! You're low on health!

text_block_list.name: Arcade Regular
text_block_list.text: Time to finish this!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
It is in the face of death that the path to survival
comes into view! This is my chance!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: She's...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I can see it! I can see it! It's right behind her... the
wilderness, expanding as far as the eye can see!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Denno Yaegaki Technique. Rockslide Cascade!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: ...Oh! What a comeback!

text_block_list.name: Arcade Regular
text_block_list.text:
Heh, you've got skills, Yaeno. That was a good
match. See you next time.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Osu! I thank you for the battle!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
You were amazing, Yaeno! That was such an
intense fight!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I see you've come to appreciate the depth
of fighting games.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...I, too, once thought little of such games.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
It was only after a friend brought me to this
arcade that I realized my error in judgment.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
This place is meant for honing skills, battling the
mighty in the hopes of mutual improvement, and
elevating oneself.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Ah, it's just like a dojo!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Quite. Martial arts, racing, games—whatever the
discipline, the path to mastery reveals itself to
the committed.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Moreover, what is learned on one path will surely
prove useful on others! That is what I believe and
strive for.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I see, I see! Wow! I kinda wanna take a whirl too!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Heh, then allow me to be your opponent. Come,
step up to the machine.
